values.value: [ { "fieldName": "Name", "label": "Opportunity Name", "type": "url", "isSortable": true, "isVisible": true, "sortOrder": 1 }, { "fieldName": "AccountId", "label": "Account Name", "type": "text", "isSortable": true, "isVisible": true, "sortOrder": 2 }, { "fieldName": "CloseDate", "label": "Close Date", "type": "date", "isSortable": true, "isVisible": true, "sortOrder": 3 }, { "fieldName": "StageName", "label": "Stage", "type": "text", "isSortable": false, "isVisible": true, "sortOrder": 4 }, { "fieldName": "Amount", "label": "Amount", "type": "currency", "isSortable": false, "isVisible": true, "sortOrder": 5 }, { "fieldName": "Probability", "label": "Probability (%)", "type": "percent", "isSortable": false, "isVisible": true, "sortOrder": 6 }, { "fieldName": "Type", "label": "Type", "type": "text", "isSortable": false, "isVisible": false, "sortOrder": 7 } ]
SELECT Id, Name, Amount, AccountId,Account.Name, Type, CloseDate, StageName, Probability FROM Opportunity
